key_findings: MAJOR drift: merger sort order contradicts AGENTS.md documentation
Branch naming documented as 3-segment but runtime uses 2-segment
IPC surface underdocumented - runtime adds commanders/, scripts/, fleet.json, state.json
Monitor does not read child-agents.jsonl despite it being a core telemetry file
No formal JSON Schema - all bundle schemas are implicit
files_changed vs files_modified naming inconsistency across components
Commander lacks explicit .tmp-/rename atomic write recipe
Orphan recovery path mismatch in monitor (task_id vs commander_id)
summary: Collaboration-bus QA reveals moderate drift between documentation and runtime prompts. Core atomic claim protocol is sound but naming, schema, and monitor integration have gaps. 3 major, 5 moderate, 4 minor drift items identified across 5 audit dimensions.
